---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for CheckMyEligibility
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what need does it address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, or anything else. If this touches scheme/certificate data, please
cite an official source.
